cases.failure_signature: User requested a text-format report or summary, but xlsx skill was triggered due to keyword 'table' appearing in the request
cases.user_correction: User clarified they wanted inline markdown, not a spreadsheet file
cases.remedy: xlsx should only trigger when the user explicitly requests a spreadsheet file, Excel, or .xlsx. Mentions of 'table' alone should default to markdown inline tables.

cases.failure_signature: User asked to read or extract content from a PDF file, but the pdf skill (creation/manipulation) was triggered instead of pdf-reading skill
cases.user_correction: Task completed after switching to pdf-reading skill manually
cases.remedy: Distinguish between pdf (create/merge/fill/encrypt) and pdf-reading (extract/read/inspect). When user says 'read', 'extract', 'what does this PDF say', route to pdf-reading.

cases.failure_signature: User requested a brief written summary or explanation, but docx skill was triggered, producing a full Word document when inline text would have sufficed
cases.user_correction: User asked for the response directly in chat instead of a file
cases.remedy: docx should only trigger when user explicitly asks for a Word document, .docx file, or a formal deliverable. Brief summaries, explanations, and conversational content should remain inline.

cases.failure_signature: User asked to build a web component but did not use explicit UI/design keywords, so the frontend-design skill was not auto-loaded
cases.remedy: frontend-design description could be broadened to trigger on 'build a component', 'create a page', 'make a form', not just explicit design/styling keywords.

cases.failure_signature: Evolver skill attempted to read session logs from a different agent workspace, causing cross-agent log contamination in multi-agent setup
cases.user_correction: Restricted evolver to single-shot mode with strict workspace isolation
cases.remedy: Always isolate cwd strictly when running evolver. Use single-shot mode (not --loop) and set EVOLVE_STRATEGY=harden in multi-agent environments.

cases.failure_signature: Deployment skill was auto-triggered by model when code appeared ready, but deployment should only happen with explicit user consent
cases.user_correction: Added disable-model-invocation: true to deploy skill frontmatter
cases.remedy: Any skill with side effects (deploy, send message, publish, commit) should have disable-model-invocation: true. Consider converting to a hook if it must run at a specific lifecycle point.
